Title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
Actors: Eric Bauza, Jeff Bergman, Bob Bergen
Plot: A reboot of the Looney Tunes, which consists of 1000 minutes spread across 1-6 minute shorts featuring Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, Tweety Bird, Sylvester Pussycat, Elmer Fudd, and the brand's other marquee characters played by a proficient voice cast in visually vibrant misadventures all driven by simple gags.
